mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement - where your dreams are more important than your reality! Get ready to experience the VIP treatment you deserve!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, there I was, sipping my triple-shot, soy, no-foam, extra-hot latte, when I remembered I had a meeting at the Bank of Entitlement headquarters. I strolled in, expecting the red carpet treatment, when disaster struck.The receptionist dared to ask me for my ID! My ID! The nerve! I mean, come on, everyone knows who I am, right? I calmly explained that I was Hot Josh, the CEO. But did she budge? No. She insisted on seeing proof of my identity.Well, let me tell you, I was not about to stand for this affront to my stature. I whipped out my phone, dialed the customer service line, and demanded to speak to the supervisor. I made it clear that if I wasn't treated like the VIP I am, I would take my business elsewhere.Within minutes, the receptionist was profusely apologizing, offering me VIP lounge access and a personal tour of the entire building. As I sipped on my latte in the plush VIP lounge, I couldn't help but smirk. That's right, never underestimate the power of Hot Josh and the Bank of Entitlement.
